bug.description: peripheral initialization in wrong order causing dependent hardware to malfunction

prompt:
There is a peripheral initialization in wrong order causing dependent hardware to malfunction downstream of function ENET_Deinit in the targets/TARGET_Freescale/TARGET_MCUXpresso_MCUS subsystem.
The function is located at targets/TARGET_Freescale/TARGET_MCUXpresso_MCUS/TARGET_MCU_K64F/drivers/fsl_enet.c:344.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
